case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS KANE, MARIE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-25-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-13-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FURTHER CONTINUANCE MAY BE ORDERED PENDING THE STATUS OF SF SUPERIOR COURT CASE # 501616.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-13-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FURTHER CONTINUANCE MAY BE ORDERED PENDING THE STATUS OF S.F. SUPERIOR COURT CASE # 501616.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,202.74 FILED BY TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT KANE, MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANE, MARIE $25.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25.00, COMMISSIONER BECKER DISCLOSES POTENTIAL CONFLICT RE: SF RENTAL BOARD AND CAPITAL IMPROVEMENTS @ 1550 BAY. PLAINTIFF WITHDRAWS CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT CLAIM $2152.74, LEAVING ONLY $50 LATE FEE CLAIM. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT CHOOSE TO GO FORWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KANE, MARIE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-25-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FURTHER CONTINUANCE MAY BE ORDERED PENDING THE STATUS OF SF SUPERIOR COURT CASE # 501616.
